messages.text: Ossuara throws wide its whole corona of blooms and breathes out the concentrated rot of the entire garden, a rolling green fog that drowns you and burns in every pore. The blow {verb} you!
Ossuara heaves and looses its blooming rot across the heart, and you hurl yourself behind a fold of fleshy wall as the green fog roars past.
Ossuara's blooming rot catches you in the open and the poison sinks into you to the marrow, sprouting pale threads before it lets you fall! The blow {verb} you!
